ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Joshua Brysk, Esq. for Plaintiff: E. Rockwell, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants:Hossein Vaheid aka VAheid Hossein, Ins. dba United Glass & Aluminum as follows:
Principal $26,204.06
Attorney Fees $660.00
Interest $2,483.97
for a total of $29,654.53

Judgment signed in open court.
